title: Copy monday doc link directly from preview card
excerpt: When working with monday boards that include many docs, it becomes time-consuming to open each one just to copy the link for sharing or referencing. It would be helpful to have a quick option to copy the doc URL directly…

posts.author: Ulkar (Ulkar Gorzen)
posts.cookedHtml:
When working with monday boards that include many docs, it becomes time-consuming to open each one just to copy the link for sharing or referencing. It would be helpful to have a quick option to copy the doc URL directly from the preview pop-up. This small improvement could significantly speed up workflows - especially for those managing multiple documents across teams, projects, or portfolios.
Would love to hear if others would benefit from this too!
